HomeServices
What We Offer

Full-Spectrum
Karting Solutions

Our Services

Everything You Need
to Launch & Operate

From a single kart purchase to a complete attraction.

Most Popular

Commercial Go Karts

Purpose-built for high-throughput rental operations, our commercial go karts deliver unmatched durability, consistent performance, and minimal maintenance demands — protecting your bottom line race after race.

  • Electric EV-Pro® series — zero emissions, low noise, ideal for indoor/outdoor
  • Gas-powered DuraTrak® series — max power for outdoor tracks
  • Junior Kart series — purpose-designed for 5–12 year age groups
  • Custom fleet sizing from 5 to 100+ units
  • Fleet management & timing system integration
Request Fleet Quote

Racing Kart Chassis

Competition-grade tubular steel chassis for club and professional racing.

  • CIK/FIA homologated designs
  • 32mm & 30mm tube options
  • Junior, Cadet, and Senior sizes
  • Custom OEM branding available
Get Chassis Quote

Track Design

Custom go kart track layout design for any space — indoor, outdoor, rooftop, or integrated in a larger attraction.

  • 3D CAD design and rendering
  • Feasibility study and site analysis
  • Safety barrier specification
  • Revenue optimization layout modeling
Request Track Design

Turnkey Solutions

The complete package: track design, kart supply, timing systems, staff training, and grand opening. One partner.

  • Single point of contact management
  • Barrier, signage & pit lane setup
  • Timing & fleet management systems
  • Staff training and operations manual
Get Turnkey Proposal
How It Works

From Enquiry to
Opening Day

Our proven 4-step process ensures every project is delivered on time, on spec, and ready to generate revenue.

01

Discovery Call

Tell us your vision, site dimensions, budget, and timeline. We'll match you to the right solution within 48 hours.

02

Design & Proposal

Our engineers produce a custom track layout, kart specification, and detailed project proposal with full cost breakdown.

03

Manufacturing & Shipping

Your karts are manufactured to spec, QA-inspected, and shipped with all documentation for smooth customs clearance.

04

Installation & Launch

Our team commissions the track, sets up all systems, trains your staff, and hands over a fully operational attraction.

FAQs

Common
Questions

Everything you need to know before starting your karting project.

Ask a Question
Our standard minimum order is 5 units. Larger fleet orders (20+ units) qualify for volume pricing and priority production slots.
Standard production lead time is 4–8 weeks. We ship worldwide via sea freight (3–6 weeks) or air freight (5–10 days).
Yes. EV-Pro® electric for indoor venues, DuraTrak® gas-powered for outdoor tracks. Both in adult and junior configurations.
Absolutely. We specialize in constrained spaces — warehouse conversions, rooftop tracks, basement circuits, and irregular outdoor footprints.
All VortKart® commercial karts carry a 12-month structural warranty on chassis and a 6-month warranty on drivetrain components. We stock spare parts for every kart model we've ever manufactured and can ship globally within 48 hours. Our technical support team is available 24/7 via phone, email, and video call.
Yes. We actively partner with distributors in territories where we don't have direct representation. Our distributor program offers preferential pricing, co-branded marketing materials, technical training, and dedicated account management. Contact us to enquire about territory availability in your region.
